scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/agent -w packages/channels -w packages/management -w packages/chat -w packages/mc -w apps/dash -w apps/gateway -w apps/tui -w apps/mc-cli
scripts.version:sync: V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && for f in packages/*/package.json apps/*/package.json; do node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('$f'));p.version='$V';fs.writeFileSync('$f',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n')"; done
